response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis—core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. Their background is predominantly in full-stack web and mobile development, with no evidence of hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or performance modeling for AI accelerators.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical leadership in diverse projects
Proven ability to build and optimize complex systems under real-world constraints
concerns: No demonstrated experience with SoC, IP, or AI accelerator hardware modeling
Lacks background in deep-learning workload performance analysis or GPU architecture
Education is a BS in CS, but no evidence of 8+ years of relevant hardware/performance-focused experience
